transcript: Speaker A (Human): बॉस ने हमको बोला सर्कल बैक, हम गोल गोल घूमने लगे बताओ। [Boss told us to circle back, and we started spinning in circles, can you believe it?] Speaker B (AI Avatar): सर्कल बैक का मतलब होता है बाद में किसी टॉपिक पर फिर से चर्चा करना। [Circle back means to discuss a topic again later.] Speaker A (Human): ओ अच्छा ये होता है मीनिंग! [Oh, so that's the meaning!] Speaker B (AI Avatar): कोई बात नहीं, तुम अभी भी इंग्लिश सीख सकते हो मेरे साथ। [No problem, you can still learn English with me.] Speaker A (Human): अरे पर कैसे सीखूं? काम के बीच में टाइम ही नहीं मिलता। [But how do I learn? I don't get time between work.] Speaker B (AI Avatar): मैं MySivi ऐप की AI हूं। बस दिन में 10 मिनट मेरे साथ प्रैक्टिस करो, फिर देखना कैसे हर जगह कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ फर्स्ट क्लास इंग्लिश बोलते हो। [I am the AI of MySivi app. Just practice with me for 10 minutes a day, then see how you speak first-class English with confidence everywhere.] Speaker A (Human): सच में? पर इसके लिए मुझे क्या करना पड़ेगा? [Really? But what do I have to do for this?] Speaker B (AI Avatar): बस MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। ये इंग्लिश सीखने के लिए नंबर वन ऐप है। मात्र ₹1 के ट्रायल में मेरे जैसे AI टीचर्स के साथ सिर्फ 2 हफ्ते में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलना शुरू कर दोगे। [Just download the MySivi app. This is the number one app for learning English. With a trial of just ₹1, you will start speaking fluent English in just 2 weeks with AI teachers like me.]
on_screen_text: BOSS [Boss], BOLA CIRCLE [Said circle], HAM GOL GOL [We round and round], CIRCLE BACK, MATLAB HOTA [Means], TOPIC, KARNA [To do], OH!, MySivi, Practice Now, Fluency Score, Your Learning Path, Talk about anything, Daily routine, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, Hobbies and Interests, Talk about your workplace, Hey! What did you do over the weekend?, I go to the beach and eat ice cream., Almost perfect! Just a small correction: I went to the beach and ate ice cream, CONFIDENCE KE [With confidence], MySivi AI English Spe..., Master Spoken Eng, MySivi Learn English Speaking, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, ₹1 on ₹299/month, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access
summary: A split-screen ad where a human employee shares a humorous misunderstanding of the corporate phrase 'circle back,' which is corrected by an AI avatar. The AI avatar then introduces the MySivi app as a convenient way to practice English for 10 minutes a day. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app and try it for just ₹1.
